case_title: ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY VS. CVP HOLDINGS INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CVP HOLDINGS INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY
SC-105: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. "ANSWER" MAILED TO DEFTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY
SC-105:"ANSWER" TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RECEIVED & FILED. FILED BY: DAVID JENNINGS.
ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS "DENIED", PER JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ANDREW FREEMAN AND COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CVP HOLDINGS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED OCT-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CVP HOLDINGS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2009 BY RICHARD B. ULMER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
